_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop and maintain a tool framework for automated test and evaluation.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in writing automated tests for data applications, including unit tests for transformation logic, integration tests for pipeline components, and data validation tests using appropriate testing frameworks.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-009 (AB, cosine: 0.551), RM-T-003 (RM, cosine: 0.524).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.683). Shared vocabulary: [automated]. DCWF-only terms [develop, evaluation, framework, maintain, test, tool] vs WIDAI-only terms [applications, appropriate, components, data, frameworks, integration] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.895 (P=0.910, R=0.880). P exceeds R by 0.030 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 27 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (60.9%). The model interprets "Develop and maintain a tool framework for automated test and evaluation." as logically implying aspects of "Skill in writing automated tests for data applications, including unit tests for" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Superset of' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.642 ≈ STS 0.683 (gap 0.041). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [automated] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.7%. Shared tokens: [automated]. DCWF-only: [develop, evaluation, framework, maintain, test, tool]. WIDAI-only: [applications, appropriate, components, data, frameworks, integration].
